# Packrift Weight Density Atlas

Public Packrift catalog-derived weight-density and DIM-pressure atlas.

- Canonical URL: https://packrift.github.io/weight-density-atlas/
- Records: 2,509
- Sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/weight-density-atlas/sitemap.xml
- Data CSV: https://packrift.github.io/weight-density-atlas/data/weight-density.csv
- Data JSONL: https://packrift.github.io/weight-density-atlas/data/weight-density.jsonl
- Stats: https://packrift.github.io/weight-density-atlas/data/stats.json
- OpenAPI: https://packrift.github.io/weight-density-atlas/openapi.json

Boundaries: static public reference only. Verify live fit, price, stock, shipping, and checkout on Packrift.com before purchase decisions. No supplier cost, margin, customer, order, cart, payment, credentials, private freight, or live carrier-rate data is exposed.

## Methodology
Rows are included only when the source graph marks them AI_APPROVE, no human approval required, active, IN_STOCK, positive inventory, priced, public-product-url addressable, positive shipping weight, positive dimensions, and no dimension-conflict flag.
